title: lycopodium complanatum subsp. issleri
intro: Lycopodium complanatum subsp. issleri, also known as club moss, is a type of evergreen plant belonging to the Lycopodiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lycopodium complanatum subsp. issleri are said to include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or consumed as a medicinal tea.
